disciplines.name: Biology
categories: CEQA Supporting Documents with Impact Analysis

tasks.name: Biological Constraints Analysis
tasks.description: Conduct desktop review and field reconnaissance to identify biological resources and potential constraints relevant to project feasibility and permitting.

tasks.name: Habitat Assessment
tasks.description: Characterize on-site and adjacent habitat conditions, identify sensitive communities, and evaluate habitat suitability for special-status species.

tasks.name: Focused Burrowing Owl Survey
tasks.description: Perform protocol-level focused surveys for burrowing owl, document sign and occupancy potential, and provide avoidance and minimization recommendations.

tasks.name: Focused Botanical Survey
tasks.description: Complete floristic surveys during the appropriate blooming window to assess the potential presence of special-status plant species.

tasks.name: Jurisdictional Delineation
tasks.description: Delineate aquatic resources and potential jurisdictional features, map limits, and summarize anticipated permitting pathways.
